title: Squirrel Removal in Flushing, Queens | $900-$2,500 | Best Pest Control NYC
metaDescription: Professional squirrel removal services in Flushing, Queens. Humane extraction, exclusion & damage repair. Serving downtown Flushing, Murray Hill & Bowne Park. Call today!
intro: Flushing residents know that squirrels are common in neighborhoods near Kissena Park and Bowne Park, but when they invade your attic or walls, professional removal becomes essential. Best Pest Control NYC provides comprehensive squirrel removal services throughout Flushing, from the bustling downtown area to the residential streets of Murray Hill and Auburndale. Our experienced technicians safely remove squirrels, seal entry points, and restore your property to prevent future infestations.
whyUs: With over a decade serving Queens communities, Best Pest Control NYC understands the unique pest challenges Flushing homeowners face, from pre-war apartment buildings to single-family homes near Northern Boulevard. Our licensed technicians provide same-day or next-day service throughout Flushing, using humane removal methods and offering warranties on all exclusion work to ensure your squirrel problem is solved permanently.
localContext: Flushing's mature trees along streets near the Flushing Meadows Corona Park and older residential architecture create ideal conditions for squirrel activity, especially during fall and spring nesting seasons. The diverse housing stock in Flushing—from historic homes in the Bowne House area to multi-family buildings downtown—each present unique entry points that our team expertly identifies and seals.

faqs.question: How much does squirrel removal cost in Flushing, Queens?
faqs.answer: Squirrel removal in Flushing typically costs between $900 and $2,500, depending on the severity of the infestation, number of entry points, and extent of damage. This includes humane trapping, complete exclusion work to seal all entry points, and sanitation services. We provide free inspections and detailed quotes before beginning any work.

faqs.question: How quickly can you remove squirrels from my Flushing home?
faqs.answer: We offer same-day or next-day service throughout Flushing and can typically remove active squirrels within 3-7 days using humane trapping methods. The complete process, including exclusion work to prevent re-entry, usually takes 1-2 weeks depending on the scope of work needed.

faqs.question: What damage do squirrels cause in Flushing attics?
faqs.answer: Squirrels in Flushing homes commonly chew through electrical wiring (creating fire hazards), damage insulation, gnaw on wooden beams and soffits, and leave droppings that can contaminate attic spaces. They often enter through roof vents, gable vents, or gaps in soffits, and can cause extensive damage if not removed promptly.

faqs.question: Do you offer warranties on squirrel exclusion work in Flushing?
faqs.answer: Yes, we provide a warranty on all exclusion and seal-up work performed in Flushing. Our technicians use durable materials like heavy-gauge steel mesh and professional-grade sealants to ensure squirrels cannot re-enter through the same points. If squirrels breach our exclusion work during the warranty period, we return at no additional charge to resolve the issue.
